response: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), founded in 1861, is consistently ranked #1 and enrolls about 11,500 students while employing 1,069 faculty members. With an acceptance rate of just 3.9% and annual tuition of $57,590, MIT maintains an endowment of $24.6 billion. Its community includes 98 Nobel laureates, underscoring its legacy of groundbreaking research and education.
